html:
Exclusive to:

The Pirate Map is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. When studied, it opens a place marked with a cross on the map, in which a pirate cache is hidden. The Pirate Map can be obtained by killing a Prime Mate.

Pirate Stash

The Pirate Stash or X is a structure that spawns at a random location in the world after exploring a Pirate Map. The stash stores various items and can be dug up using a Shovel. In addition to resources, the cache also includes items stolen from any players by Powder Monkeys.

Item Count Drop Chance
2-4 100%
2-4 100%
2-4 30%
1-3 30%
1-4 15%
1-3 50%
1 16%
1 4%
() 1 50%
() 1 50%
Items stolen by Powder Monkeys

Tips

  • The Pirate Stash (X) can be found without reading the Pirate Map. The player can search around the edge of the map to find the mark.
  • The Pirate Stash can spawn on Lunar Island, including its satellite islands.
  • The Pirate Stash has 30 slots. Anything beyond the limit will be deleted. The player should be aware of this to not lose important items.
ResourcesStructures

Exclusive to:
“It's nice to have some direction in life.”
–Wilson
“Ha! Those dumb monkeys left a map to their treasure!”
–Willow
“Is map to monkey riches.”
–Wolfgang
“No map will lead me to what my heart seeks.”
–Wendy
“FOOLS. THEY WROTE DOWN THE COORDINATES INSTEAD OF STORING THEM IN THEIR MEMORY BANKS”
–WX-78
“The penmanship is messy, but legible.”
–Wickerbottom
“Whatcha say, Luce? Should we see where it leads?”
–Woodie
“Now I suppose I'll have to go out and fetch what was stolen from me.”
–Maxwell
“We jöurney tö find the hidden plunder!”
–Wigfrid
“It's a real treasure map!”
–Webber
“Ah, it looks like this will lead me to some treasure!”
–Warly
“Where Cheekies put treasure stuff”
–Wormwood
“Might find some loot if I follow this.”
–Winona
“This map has the clues I need, now where does it lead?”
–Wortox
“It show where stuff hiding? Gonna get it first, florp!”
–Wurt
“Every Pinetree Pioneer knows how to follow a map.”
–Walter
“It looks like I'm not the only one who forgets where I put things.”
–Wanda
The Pirate Map is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. When studied, it opens a place marked with a cross on the map, in which a pirate cache is hidden.
The Pirate Map can be obtained by killing a Prime Mate.
Pirate Stash[edit | edit source]
Pirate Stash (X)
Source
Can be Dug
Miscellaneous
"pirate_stash"
“I'm diggin' the decor.”
–Wilson
“Treasure! Heh, I'm pretty good at this.”
–Willow
“Haha! Wolfgang has found treasure hiding-place!”
–Wolfgang
“Oh... did I... find the treasure?”
–Wendy
“THE TREASURE IS MINE”
–WX-78
“That appears to be the location indicated on the map.”
–Wickerbottom
“"X marks the spot", eh?”
–Woodie
“Hooray.”
–Maxwell
“There lies the treasure!”
–Wigfrid
“We found the treasure!”
–Webber
“Et voila, the treasure!”
–Warly
“Yay! Found treasure stuff”
–Wormwood
“I think this is the place.”
–Winona
“What a splendid "X"! Well worth the trip.”
–Wortox
“Found it! Mine!!”
–Wurt
“That has to be where the treasure is!”
–Walter
“Somehow I was not expecting an actual \"X\" to be there on the ground.”
–Wanda
The Pirate Stash or X is a structure that spawns at a random location in the world after exploring a Pirate Map. The stash stores various items and can be dug up using a Shovel. In addition to resources, the cache also includes items stolen from any players by Powder Monkeys.

Tips[edit | edit source]
The Pirate Stash (X) can be found without reading the Pirate Map. The player can search around the edge of the map to find the mark.
The Pirate Stash can spawn on Lunar Island, including its satellite islands.
The Pirate Stash has 30 slots. Anything beyond the limit will be deleted. The player should be aware of this to not lose important items.

The '''Pirate Map''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. When studied, it opens a place marked with a cross on the map, in which a pirate cache is hidden.
The Pirate Map can be obtained by killing a [[Prime Mate]].

== {{Pic32|prototype}} Tips ==
* The Pirate Stash (X) can be found without reading the Pirate Map. The player can search around the edge of the map to find the mark. 
* The Pirate Stash can spawn on [[Lunar Island]], including its satellite islands.
* The Pirate Stash has 30 slots. Anything beyond the limit will be deleted. The player should be aware of this to not lose important items.
